technical_seo.heading: How We Approach Technical SEO
technical_seo.subtitle: Technical SEO is not a one-time fix. It is a system.

steps.title: Diagnose Before Optimising
steps.description: We identify root causes, not symptoms.

steps.title: Prioritise by Impact
steps.description: Issues are ranked by SEO risk and revenue impact, not arbitrary checklists.

steps.title: Fix at the Right Layer
steps.description: Server, CMS, codebase, or infrastructure. We fix problems where they actually originate.

steps.title: Build for Scale
steps.description: Our solutions are designed to support growth, not create future technical debt.

steps.title: Validate and Monitor
steps.description: Every fix is tested, tracked, and monitored for stability.

local_seo.heading: How We Approach Local SEO
local_seo.subtitle: Local SEO works when every signal aligns.

steps.title: Location First, Not Keywords First
steps.description: We optimise for proximity, relevance, and trust.

steps.title: Google Maps and Organic Work Together
steps.description: Local pack and organic results are treated as a single system.

steps.title: Conversion Matters as Much as Visibility
steps.description: Traffic without calls is wasted effort.

steps.title: Scalable, Not Spammy
steps.description: We avoid shortcuts that trigger volatility or suspensions.

steps.title: Continuous Optimisation
steps.description: Local SEO requires ongoing refinement, not set-and-forget tactics.

seo_audit.heading: How Our SEO Audit Process Works
seo_audit.subtitle: Our audits are structured, transparent, and outcome-driven.

steps.title: Step 1: Discovery & Goals Alignment
steps.description: We understand your business model, market, and growth objectives.

steps.title: Step 2: Full Data & Platform Review
steps.description: We analyse Search Console, analytics, crawl data, and SERP behaviour.

steps.title: Step 3: Issue Identification & Impact Scoring
steps.description: We prioritise issues based on ranking and revenue impact, not theory.

steps.title: Step 4: Actionable SEO Roadmap
steps.description: You receive a clear plan with: What to fix, Why it matters, How to fix it, What to do first. If you want, we can also execute the fixes.

on_page_seo.heading: How Our On-Page SEO Process Works
on_page_seo.subtitle: Clear, repeatable, and execution-ready.

steps.title: Step 1: Page & Keyword Audit
steps.description: We analyse existing pages, rankings, and intent mismatches.

steps.title: Step 2: Optimisation Blueprint
steps.description: Each page receives a clear optimisation plan covering content, structure, and linking.

steps.title: Step 3: Implementation or Guidance
steps.description: We either implement changes directly or provide precise instructions for your team.

steps.title: Step 4: Validation & Monitoring
steps.description: We track improvements in rankings, engagement, and conversion signals.

steps.title: 1. Authority Audit
steps.description: We evaluate your backlink profile, authority score, and competitor landscape.

steps.title: 2. Strategy Development
steps.description: We define anchor distribution, link velocity, and placement priorities.

steps.title: 3. Outreach & Acquisition
steps.description: Manual outreach with editorial standards.

steps.title: 4. Monitoring & Reporting
steps.description: We track link quality, growth trends, and ranking movement.

steps.title: 5. Risk Management
steps.description: We continuously monitor for harmful backlinks and algorithm risks.

e_commerce_seo.heading: How Our E-Commerce SEO Process Works
e_commerce_seo.subtitle: Built for clarity, scale, and execution.

steps.title: Step 1: Store & Revenue Audit
steps.description: We analyse your products, categories, URLs, filters, and revenue drivers.

steps.title: Step 2: Keyword & Intent Mapping
steps.description: Commercial keywords are mapped to the right pages without cannibalisation.

steps.title: Step 3: Technical & Structural Optimisation
steps.description: We clean crawl paths, fix indexation, and stabilise site architecture.

steps.title: Step 4: Page-Level Optimisation
steps.description: Products and categories are optimised for rankings and conversions.

steps.title: Step 5: Monitoring & Scaling
steps.description: We track rankings, revenue pages, and growth opportunities.

link_building.heading: How Our Link Building Process Works
link_building.subtitle: Built for safety, scale, and results.

steps.title: Step 1: Backlink & Risk Audit
steps.description: We assess your current backlink profile for quality, relevance, and risk.

steps.title: Step 2: Authority & Intent Mapping
steps.description: We map links to priority pages based on ranking and revenue goals.

steps.title: Step 3: Prospecting & Outreach
steps.description: Targets are vetted manually for relevance, authority, and editorial standards.

steps.title: Step 4: Placement & Quality Control
steps.description: Every link is reviewed before placement. No automation. No shortcuts.

steps.title: Step 5: Monitoring & Authority Growth
steps.description: We track link impact, rankings, and authority signals over time.

seo_migration.heading: How Our SEO Migration Process Works
seo_migration.subtitle: Built to reduce risk and protect performance.

steps.title: Step 1: Pre-Migration SEO Audit
steps.description: We benchmark current rankings, traffic, URLs, backlinks, and technical signals. Nothing moves without a baseline.

steps.title: Step 2: URL Mapping & Redirect Planning
steps.description: Every old URL is mapped to its new equivalent. No blanket redirects. No broken equity.

steps.title: Step 3: Technical SEO Validation
steps.description: We review crawlability, internal linking, canonicals, schema, metadata, and site structure.

steps.title: Step 4: Migration Execution Support
steps.description: We work alongside developers during launch to catch issues in real time.

steps.title: Step 5: Post-Migration Monitoring & Fixes
steps.description: We monitor rankings, coverage reports, crawl errors, and performance daily. Issues are fixed before they compound.
